testcase.name: @AfterClass tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49680/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.181, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: testcase.name: verify_account_registration
